programme.title: The Way of the Master
programme.desc: Atheism cannot account for love. Without God, there can be no love.

programme.title: Sea Kids

programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The significance of the Cross, and how you must take up your own cross. Galatians 6 (Boston 1982).

programme.title: Ready, Set, Glow!
programme.desc: Wes Brown meets four families whose Christmas decorations have been making spirits bright for generations. The only thing better than these displays are the heartwarming stories behind them.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Glow!
programme.desc: Wes Brown meets four families whose bonds are strengthened each year as they make new memories building exceptional holiday light displays.

programme.title: Ready, Set, Glow!
programme.desc: There's no time of year that makes us feel more connected than Christmas. Wes Brown makes his way across the country to meet families who join with friends and neighbors to build jaw dropping community displays.

programme.title: Charting Christmas
programme.desc: This documentary looks at the history of Christmas providing answers to questions like: "How did the good Bishop Saint Nicholas become Santa Claus?""Why do we have Christmas trees, the Nativity plays and Christmas Carols?"

programme.title: Power for Living
programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: GGC Life TV
programme.desc: Glorious Gospel Church aims to create a relatable, life-changing church based firmly in the bible, expressing the Good News of Jesus Christ in a practical way.

programme.title: Impact for Life
programme.desc: Pastors Peter and Bev Mortlock share principles for living, hear life stories from everyday New Zealanders and equip people to mature and grow into Christ-likeness while maximising their potential.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. LIFE TV uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join pastor Dr David Jeremiah as he challenges viewers to take hold of the truths of God's Word for themselves and to apply it to the daily circumstances in their own life, by presenting God's truth in clear and practical applications.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Key to Making Wise Decisions/Does It Matter What You Believe?
programme.desc: Tackling important life issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the word of God.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: In part two of Your Checklist for Prayer, Pastor Bayless continues walking through the questions you should ask before you pray, addressing essential checkpoints that can impact your prayer life.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: The Elevation Experience with Pastor Steven Furtick features inspirational and challenging messages from Pastor Steven as well as original worship music from Elevation Church in Charlotte, North Carolina.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: PowerPoint Ministries started as a vision of Dr Jack Graham 20 years ago with a vision to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Joel Osteen
programme.desc: Direct from Houston, Texas, join Joel and Victoria Osteen and the team from Lakewood Church, for a session of powerful music and empowering preaching.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Language of The Holy Spirit
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace, helping believers understand how greatly blessed and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.desc: New York Times bestselling author, Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings practical meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church with a global ministry.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Developing the Character of God - Part 3
programme.desc: God doesn't cause our suffering, but He is pleased when we respond to trouble the right way. Today, Joyce shares how to grow stronger and develop godly character.

programme.title: It Takes a Child
programme.desc: A former sponsor child explores a village in Samar, Philippines that has been impacted by child sponsorship. For many families here, poverty has ripped away their options; but Compassion sponsorship is showing a way out.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion.

programme.title: Soul Sessions Christmas Special
programme.desc: Join Soul Sessions host Sara Jane Elika and a collection of New Zealand gospel music and Pacific musicians and artists for a joy-filled Christmas special that will have your toes tapping and your heart singing.

programme.title: Three Wiser Men and a Boy
programme.desc: Three brothers are surprised when they find themselves forced to care for a baby during the festive season, and begin to rebuild their relationships while rediscovering their love for Christmas.

programme.title: The Ride: A Christmas Eve Parable
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and a bored taxi driver accepts one more pickup. The man asks to be taken to a local bridge and the cabbie soon begins to suspect his passenger's plans. He delays the ride as he tries to connect with his customer.

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.sub-title: The Language of The Holy Spirit
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of grace, helping believers understand how greatly blessed and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Catholic Guy
programme.desc: Bruce Downes is The Catholic Guy. No matter your age, situation or background, be prepared to laugh, learn and listen to what God is trying to say to you. Wherever you matter where you are around the world today, God is never far from you.

programme.title: Songs of Praise

programme.desc: The Deen Brothers take a few days off from hitting the pavement and head to Jamie's lake house outside of Athens, GA, for a few days of rest.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy and his son, Hunter, take a trip to Juneau. They taste reindeer pie from a wood-fired pizza wagon and some Latin-Asian fusion in a basement spot.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers: Dream Car

programme.desc: Team Kye is ready to do whatever it takes to get a win and climb back to the top. Murder Nova and his team look for any advantage to win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: The Great Eight
programme.desc: Racers line up in Tulsa, OK, for the Great 8 race - but changing temperatures challenge the drivers. Everyone's chasing Kye, the current points leader.

programme.title: Street Outlaws

programme.desc: Richard, Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew unbury a '64 Impala buried in 10 years of debris and bring it back to life.
